violations.text: Food debris and a strainer were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
The 1 door salad lowboy gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
The floor by the prep units is in poor repair (tile and grout). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
